seoTitle: Ducklo vs Dugandan — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Ducklo and Dugandan. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Ducklo and Dugandan.
heading: Ducklo vs Dugandan — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Ducklo, Queensland and Dugandan, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Ducklo and Dugandan have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Ducklo or Dugandan safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Ducklo has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Dugandan scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Ducklo scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Dugandan scores 51/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Ducklo or Dugandan?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Ducklo has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.27% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
